summary: Pytest run failed due to a doctest failure in the documentation file doc/callbacks.rst (line 48), causing the test suite to exit with code 1.
root_cause: A doctest in /home/runner/work/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/doc/callbacks.rst at line 48 raised a DocTestFailure, causing pytest to report a failed test and exit nonzero.

suggested_fix: Open /home/runner/work/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/doc/callbacks.rst and inspect the doctest at or around line 48; update the code example or expected output so the doctest passes. Re-run the failing test locally with pytest ../doc/callbacks.rst::callbacks.rst to verify the fix.
